name: Grefgor the Moth
description: Hewwo. Mai name is Grefgor... people also call mi cuddlebug... iam 3 feet tall, I'm a moff, and I am... uhh... kimda dum. I like lites, big lites, smol lites, lites that hum. I also like to eat clothes... I like to nom them wif mai little mouf. I cam fwy, but I am too lazi to. I jus kimda waddle aroumb. I wuv cubbles... they are the best! I have 4 wittle nub hands... and 2 nub leggs
creator: Siyamon
